textByHash.9804ace97761e59a965e4d461066e2de1cbaf2b6: The blessings of Saradomin be with you child.
textByHash.8968a02e0d5fa9cf4cb87f99e737a0574200169d: And a good day to you my son.
textByHash.4a72c3cf0fead5657647ba45b1a2c7e1cbc7a3d9: And a good day to you my daughter.
textByHash.009439aa7a4b569c69680414de6b221f83b4e738: I am Brother Maledict, at your service.
textByHash.fdba77dab4f109fd9d8aef178f858817f8ede01d: Well, to be perfectly honest with you, I am a little concerned.
textByHash.a3a1445fd60fabb6fb81133eac9ecab0257b51be: It's my congregation. They seem to be drifting away from me.
textByHash.d370806f998e7864746218e56af2cee767b8db82: With all the hardships this small village has endured in the past few years, the people of Witchaven have never needed the solace of Saradomin more.
textByHash.cedff1bdbb251c7bcfc688901d289f5ca1fecb85: Yes indeed. However, less and less people have been attending my services lately.
textByHash.6332b0943c504a5ed3d17802a6de3aaaa6b9a672: The only thing I can think of, is that the Mayor has asked them to help improve the shrine.
textByHash.809a0db3321a88d6e059d4d8fe449a7ecde0185c: Ah yes, one of the wonders of Witchaven. That particular shrine has existed since before Witchaven was even founded.
textByHash.1c7352a06435a1cb107fd5ffe55b0bd73b68fa97: Over one hundred and fifty years old in fact.
textByHash.f34e0b2bd583b9d0c66bced118744ddc1f5a37db: The role I now fulfill was originally given to one of the Temple Guardians, but in time that has been delegated to one of the ordained, such as myself.
textByHash.282f6f90e8ff05d74c771df2d1f05e5675ac66f6: The shrine was abandoned when the village came into being. Since then it has fallen into disrepair and other less savoury elements have moved in.
textByHash.99dd3faafa5a454d62d785e27273e82e6dc4af34: Well yes, it came as something of a pleasant shock. I only hope he will let me visit it soon.
textByHash.33fe9eb1a46dfec4b9f8b197dffb8982aaa14728: He wants me to wait until it's ready to unveil.
textByHash.8765435e17cb859bda96860dd878a2fdcf387dc2: Anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.6c95ed8ef18783139234b8f07281a4fe0335c948: Ah, the people of Witchaven are the salt of the earth. Hardworking and very generous. Well, usually that is.
textByHash.a108da98cc24118354f3f5ea0ed298c8886c4975: Oh, most of them certainly. It's just that something has changed over the past few weeks.
textByHash.2fd8f153bf7006ea19511bb2d2df34706043322e: It's nothing I can put my finger on. My flock aren't exactly unfriendly anymore, just different.
textByHash.a2ac7158fc1851579db01ec3660ec4841132dcc7: Well, they used to be very rigorous in attending my services. Now they seem almost apathetic.
textByHash.d2679007769994376b3ba38c676e993567e1d898: They wander around the village in a listless state, everyone except the Mayor that is.
textByHash.34a55106f00a412bc49ec13dfbca23eed5deb4eb: Since the opening of the Fishing Platform he was a man beset by worries. The only thing that occupied his mind was how to rescue his village from financial collapse.
textByHash.b27595d8bbe16fb11866d5c4bed20ef97d55618a: Ordinarily, I would welcome his new found drive and energy, especially as it is directed towards renovating the shrine
textByHash.0ab20162ccc59a76f80aef61cf4016cc4d049a6a: I'm not sure but something about him has me worried.
textByHash.3f49b3d68a3251f7b95fbbec06a4c17b3f51e680: Perhaps. Maybe I'm being a little paranoid. I'll give it some thought.
textByHash.07496aefe7871837214bada2a99cfd784300fd69: In the meantime, is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.6535925eb1ef7675fc3c3c5471003ac72b1d549f: And a good day to you again. How can I help?
textByHash.f35013f8b1717698282cbc8836b8c94622ba3eeb: Hmm. Oh, yes. We are Maledict.
textByHash.8fdd6cbe1391667619bb2036156b4cebac365530: It's nothing, just a little tired at the moment. So much work, so much to do.
textByHash.15d772cbe2278e92808abe387f0248dd16dadb71: Most of the history of the shrine is contained within the holy book of Saradomin. We have yet to read that portion of the text.
textByHash.c94461f20ee979ded8d2213ad0c6b544f4d1961e: Because the three pages pertaining to the shrine's history have been stolen.
textByHash.4d1e0fd880b4b441e35161b9f2c7d58b0a719e9a: It is imperative that you find them.
textByHash.e7c52930a903e72442f75c96a7823ab1b24518e1: The joys of family are not to be underestimated child.
